nodes.label: The one channelbag of a layered (4.4+) action.
A source clip by name, tolerating the FBX importer's object prefix.      A fresh
{(data_path, array_index): fcurve} for every channel in `action`.
Bone name -> 'L' | 'R' | 'C', from where the bone sits laterally.      X is the
Everything hanging off either clavicle — the wings.
Build an action by copying `template`'s channel layout and overwriting it.
Force the last frame to equal the first, so the clip loops without a pop.      T
Flip `quat` onto `reference`'s hemisphere; q and -q are the same pose.
Push `quat` further from (or nearer to) `reference` along the same arc.
One channel of the level cycle: left from SkyMoveL, right from SkyMoveR.      Th
Fly_Level_Loop — the clip the source never had.      Both wings at their authore
Fly_BankL_Loop / Fly_BankR_Loop — the same window, unmirrored.      Full authore
Fly_Hover_Loop — slower, deeper, body carried more upright.      Airborne-and-st
Fly_Glide_Loop — wings held out, with enough life not to read as a freeze.
Resample a clip onto a shorter timeline.
Ease a clip's tail onto `target` so it ends on a pose, not mid-move.      `targe
Fly_Dracarys — breathing fire on the wing.      Skill08 is the only fire breath
Build every derived clip. Returns {name: action}.
Delete the Daenerys/cloak chain — 61 bones with no vertex groups.
Drop every action not in `keep`, matching past the FBX object prefix.
